theme.archetype: Performance Pro with AI Neon touches
theme.rationale: High energy, focus-driven environment for goal setting. Obsidian background minimizes eye strain, while bold orange accents trigger action and motivation.

typography.strategy: Load custom fonts via @expo-google-fonts/outfit (Headings) and @expo-google-fonts/plus-jakarta-sans (Body) for a premium, non-default mobile experience.

patterns.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 with spring animation
patterns.task_complete: Strikethrough text with checkmark scale bounce, brief haptic feedback (expo-haptics)

buttons.primary: Solid #FF5E00 background, fully rounded (full), bold white text. Use glow shadow if main CTA.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px subtle border, white text.
buttons.ai_action: Gradient border or subtle #00F0FF tint to signify AI generation.

cards.default: Surface color (#18181B), 24px radius, 1px subtle border, no heavy drop shadows in dark mode.
cards.elevated: Surface_elevated color (#27272A), 16px radius, for inner cards like tasks.

inputs.text: Surface_elevated background (#27272A), 16px radius, placeholder in tertiary text, active border is primary color.

icons.library: @expo/vector-icons (Feather for standard UI, FontAwesome5 for specific solids)

screens_blueprint.name: Onboarding / Auth
screens_blueprint.layout: Full-screen vertical image background with bottom-heavy content.
elements: Hero Image Background (Abstract Orange Gradient)
Bold H1: 'Turn Ambition into Action'
Value prop subtitle
Primary CTA: 'Get Started'
Secondary CTA: 'Log In'

screens_blueprint.name: Goal Creation Form
screens_blueprint.layout: Multi-step flow, progress bar at top.
elements: Large clean inputs for Goal Title
Date picker for Deadline
Slider/chips for Current Level & Time Commitment
Floating action button (FAB) for 'Next' to keep keyboard clear

screens_blueprint.name: Goal Plan Screen (AI Roadmap)
elements: Header: Goal Title with total progress %
AI Insights Card: 'Why this plan works' (Cyan accent)
Milestones List: Vertical connecting line, card for each milestone
Weekly breakdown accordion

screens_blueprint.name: Daily Dashboard
elements: Header: Greeting & Date
Top Row: Circular Progress Ring (Today's completion) & Streak Counter (Flame icon)
Section: 'Missed Tasks' (Warning state, highlighted subtly in red/orange)
Section: 'Today's Action Plan' (Checklist items with Reanimated bouncy checkboxes)
FAB: Add quick thought/task

screens_blueprint.name: Weekly AI Review
elements: Bar chart or simple stats of week's performance
AI Coach Feedback: Generative text block in elevated card
Next Week's Focus Area

screens_blueprint.name: Pricing / Upgrade
elements: Background: Dark Luxury Texture
Free Plan (Basic Card)
Pro Plan (Highlighted card, Orange border, Glow shadow)
Coach Plan (Premium card, maybe subtle gradient text)
Purchase CTA: Apple Pay / Google Pay button styling

image_urls.description: Abstract orange and black gradient background for high-energy initial load.
Smooth metallic waves against a dark background for the pricing/upgrade screen.
Dark red/orange abstract geometric background for AI analysis loading states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use StyleSheet or NativeWind/Tailwind for React Native. The guidelines assume standard RN or Expo styling capabilities.
For complex animations like the progress ring, use react-native-reanimated and react-native-svg.
Apply `testID` (and optionally `data-testid` if using React Native Web) for all interactive elements to follow the testability requirements.
All navigation must use React Navigation (bottom tabs for main dashboard, native stack for inner screens like Goal Plan & AI Review).
